title: Totem Reskin Resource Pack (REQUIRED FOR DATAPACK)
description: This is a required resource pack that is supposed to be used along side The Totem Reskin Datapack.
body:
This is a required resource pack that is supposed to be used along side The [Totem Reskin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/totem-reskin) Datapack.

(Note: Requires basic JSON editing—but i have included clear instructions in config.txt!
